answers: Start with just 5 minutes: sit comfortably, close eyes, focus on your breath. When your mind wanders, gently bring it back. That's it!
Meditation benefits: reduces stress, improves focus, better sleep, lower anxiety, and emotional balance. Even 10 minutes daily makes a difference.
Try apps like Headspace or Calm for guided meditation. Start with breathing exercises, then move to body scan and mindfulness meditation.
Mindfulness tip: you don't need a special place or time. Simply pause, take 3 deep breaths, and notice how you feel. Do this multiple times a day.
